output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?club ?foundingDate WHERE {
  ?club wdt:P131 wd:Q197025 .
  ?club wdt:P31 wd:Q1375026 .
  ?season wdt:P585 ?seasonStart .
  ?season wdt:P137 wd:Q699876 .
  FILTER(YEAR(?seasonStart) = 2013)
  .
  ?club wdt:P740 ?season .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?club wdt:P571 ?foundingDate .
  }
}
